How to do

Three steps, that's all

1
👤

Create an account

Sign up online and subscribe to the Pikala monthly plan for 200 DH.

2
📍

Find a bike

From your phone, locate the nearest available Pikala bike on the map.

3
📱

Scan the QR code

Scan the QR code on the bike with your phone to unlock it instantly. Let’s go!
